title: component-request-v1
description: The v1 contract for the agent -> external-tool handoff brief. The agent emits a JSON file at .website-builder/briefs/{component}-{ts}.json matching this schema; the user pastes it into ChatGPT / Claude.ai / v0 / Cursor / Lovable / Bolt.new or hands it to a human freelancer. Stack-agnostic: the same brief retargets to any output stack by editing only the output_format block. Concrete realisation of handoff-spec/component-request-v1.md (block-by-block SSOT) + DESIGN-handoff-protocol.md + DESIGN-content-layers.md Layer 5. Per locked decisions 24 (protocol is fundamental) + 35 (default agent-writes-code; brief-emit opt-in).

$schema.description: Schema identifier the brief declares. The plugin's session-start hook matches this to look up the right parser. Relative-path form per JSON-Schema-in-plugin convention (DESIGN-handoff-protocol.md 'Schema location precedent').

$version.description: Spec version. Breaking changes ship as component-request-v2 with migration notes.

type.description: Discriminator. Always component-request for this schema.

id.description: Round-trip binding key — output files reference it back. Format: {component-slug}-{iso-8601-ts} with NO colons in the timestamp (filename-safe) and a Z suffix for UTC. e.g. hero-block-2026-05-19T16-32-00Z.

created.description: Emission timestamp, ISO 8601 UTC (with colons; this is a real timestamp, not a filename).

iteration.description: Round counter. 0 = first emission; 1 = first re-attempt with iteration_history populated. Must equal iteration_history length.

iteration_history.description: Round-trip memory. Empty array on round 0. Each entry carries what a prior attempt got wrong so the next round-trip improves.

instructions_for_external_tool.description: Templated instruction string the agent generates from the other blocks. Carries the load-bearing 'use ONLY the provided design tokens' discipline clause. The user may edit before pasting, but the agent warns if the discipline clause is removed.

subject.title: subject
subject.description: What is being generated. handoff-spec/component-request-v1.md Block 1.

kind.description: What class of artifact. Most briefs are component.

name.description: PascalCase component name (or kebab-case page slug for kind: page).

purpose.description: 1-2 sentences. Why this exists in the project.

brand_context.title: brand_context
brand_context.description: The brand the external tool must respect. Sourced from .website-builder/ project state at emission time. The external tool MUST use ONLY tokens from this block. handoff-spec/component-request-v1.md Block 2.

color_palette.description: brand.yaml.tokens.colors (Layer 1). OKLCH always — perceptually uniform, predictable contrast. Free-form key -> OKLCH-string map (primary / neutral_900 / semantic_error / etc.).

typography.description: brand.yaml.tokens.typography (Layer 1). Display / body / mono families + a type scale.

scale.description: Map of role (h1 / h2 / body / ...) -> { size, lh, weight }.

type_scale_entry.title: type_scale_entry
type_scale_entry.description: One role in the type scale: size + line-height + weight.

request.title: request
request.description: What is actually wanted. Sourced from components.yaml if the component exists; from a freshly-drafted spec if net-new at phase 18. handoff-spec/component-request-v1.md Block 3.

props.description: Map of prop-name -> typed prop descriptor.

behavior.description: Bullet list of behavioural requirements. Plain prose.

responsive.description: Per phase-14 breakpoints. Keys are breakpoint names (mobile_360 / tablet_768 / desktop_1280 or whatever the project uses); values are free-form breakpoint spec objects.

accessibility.description: Required a11y obligations the external tool must honour.

alt_text_required.description: Image prop(s) requiring alt text. String or array of strings.

states.description: Default / loading / hover / focus / error states as applicable. Map of state-name -> description.

prop.title: prop
prop.description: A single typed component prop. handoff-spec/component-request-v1.md Block 3 props table.

output_format.title: output_format
output_format.description: What the external tool should produce. The ONLY block that varies by stack — change it to retarget the same brief to a different stack. handoff-spec/component-request-v1.md Block 4.

file_path_hint.description: Suggestion only — external tools place files where they default; the agent moves on ingest.

file_count_hint.description: Integer — 1 for a single component; >1 when multi-file output is expected.

tool_used.description: Free-form (v0 / chatgpt / claude-ai / cursor / lovable / bolt-new / human-freelancer-{name}).

output_ingested_at.description: Path the output was saved at, e.g. .website-builder/outputs/HeroBlock-...tsx.

issues_found.description: Issues the palette validator + token-fidelity sweep caught on this round. Carried into the next round's instructions_for_external_tool.
